untranslatable_reason: The signal requires explicit trendline construction from major low points and a parallel line from the highest high. These require custom trendline detection logic (identifying 2-3+ pivot lows, fitting a line, drawing a parallel from highest high) which cannot be expressed using the allowed indicators. The Donchian channels provided a proxy approximation but do not capture the author's intended trendline-based channel mechanics.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower as channel boundaries) with entry near lower boundary and exit on upper boundary breach. However, this does not capture the core mechanic of constructing trendlines from identified pivot lows and drawing parallels from swing highs, which requires custom trendline detection unavailable in the allowed indicator set.
